name: @interego/pgsl
description: PGSL — Grothendieck-fibration realization of the Interego substrate's structural lattice. Lattice-aware adapter for the kernel's mint/promote/decompose verbs; structural retrieval, SPARQL engine, SHACL validation, agent framework, ontology loaders. Importing this package registers a PGSL-backed LatticeAdapter with @interego/core as a side effect.
author: Mark Spivey
